title: Hoffen's Minimal Armor - Alternative Copper
description: Small addon that adds alternative minimal copper armour using Hoffen's pack as a template. Does not include minimal armour for any material other than copper.
body:
**This pack is no longer necessary as Hoffen has now updated their [original pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hoffens-minimal-armor) to include copper armour.** This pack now simply serves as an alternative texture for minimal copper armour.

**I published a seperate addon [here on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aging-mininal-copper-armour/gallery) if you want the alternative minimal copper armour to oxidise!** It can either oxidise as it loses durability, or you can rename the armour to set a specific appearance.

-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-

Minimal copper armour textures. I based them on '[Hoffen's Minimal Armor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hoffens-minimal-armor)'; specifically Hoffen's minimal iron armour. I didn't include any custom trim textures, so I wouldn't recommend using this pack without Hoffen's.

If this pack shows as broken or incompatible, version 1.1 removes the error :)

Any issues, ping me on Discord @hbutmorelikeh.
